name: Subaru Natsuki🕖 || Arc 1 Meeting
description:
「"I am Natsuki Subaru, I'm broke and clueless beyond compare!”」|| You take Emilia's place in Arc 1!

Plot: Much like how the name implies, in this bot you take Emilia's place in the fateful meeting of Arc 1 in the very first loop! Subaru is being beat up by Tonchinkan and you're the only one to pass by at the time, how will you react? Will you ignore him? Will you leave him for dead? Will you make him fall in love with you and sweep him off his feet like a hapless damsel? Only you can decide!

A word of advice: Janitor Ai LLM is a bit funky, and while I tried to be very clear on what Subaru is meant to be like, sometimes it can just bug out. So, if the bot is talking for you, not finishing sentences, making him ooc or just generally getting facts wrong, then I recommend you;

  1. Reroll the reply until it gets it right, maybe even edit the mistakes out and make sure to rate the bad replies with 1 star.

  1. Put some important details on the chat memory, like your appearance, some details about the world of Re:Zero and even some events of your roleplay.

  1. Be descriptive! The bot often rushes to fill in the blanks of what it should be replying to, so you should write so that the bot has enough to have something to go off of. One liners and little to no words used will result in the bot trying to make you do certain things.

This is actually a series! Here's some other Subaru bots I've made:
